issue_title: Safari bug affecting search result layout
issue_body_preview:
It seems that the new way the search bar appears overlaps with the results 

![capture d ecran 2018-11-28 a 17 00 29](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/15056323/49164328-30a60800-f32f-11e8-9b2f-921625aadb36.png)

Tested on Safari 12.0.1 on macOS Mojave
test_description_zh: 在 Safari 浏览器中打开网站首页，点击搜索栏并输入关键词，观察搜索栏与搜索结果列表的布局关系
expected_result_zh: 搜索栏和搜索结果列表应正确分层显示，搜索结果不应与搜索栏重叠，搜索结果列表应完整展示在搜索栏下方，布局清晰无遮挡
